title: HuBMAP: Paraffin Embedding Tissue Samples
author: Marda Jorgensen
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bam9ic96

steps.title: Place processed cassettes in wax holding chamber of embedding center
steps.instruction: Place processed cassettes in wax holding chamber of embedding center. Stock station with embedding utensils, gauze, and disposable embedding molds.

steps.title: View the tissue sample and select...
steps.instruction: View the tissue sample and select an appropriately sized disposable embedding mold.

steps.title: Using forceps, tap the dispenser plate...
steps.instruction: Using forceps, tap the dispenser plate on the embedding center's dispensing nozzle and partially fill a mold with molten paraffin.

steps.title: Using heated forceps, carefully transfer the...
steps.instruction: Using heated forceps, carefully transfer the tissue inside the cassette into the mold, placing the tissue cut side down (surface viewed when opening the cassette).

steps.title: Open the cassette carefully maintaining tissue orientation
steps.instruction: Open the cassette carefully maintaining tissue orientation. Dispose of cassette lid.

steps.title: Preheat embedding utensils in the forceps...
steps.instruction: Preheat embedding utensils in the forceps warming chambers located on the sides of the paraffin dispensing nozzle. Turn on station cold plate module. .

steps.title: Transfer the mold to the cold...
steps.instruction: Transfer the mold to the cold pad in front of the dispensing nozzle, and gently press tissue flat with forceps or a tamper. Allow paraffin to solidify in a thin layer, to hold the tissue in position.

steps.title: Once oriented with the tissue specimen...
steps.instruction: Once oriented with the tissue specimen in the center of the mold, place the lower basket of the emptied cassette on top of the mold.

steps.title: Add additional molten paraffin to 2/3 fill the cassette basket
steps.instruction: Add additional molten paraffin to 2/3 fill the cassette basket. Remove any bubbles that may form between the mold and the cassette by slowly lifting and repositioning the cassette.

steps.title: Carefully transfer paraffin filled mold to...
steps.instruction: Carefully transfer paraffin filled mold to freezing/cold plate module of embedding station. Allow paraffin to completely solidify.

steps.title: If you have additional tissue samples...
steps.instruction: If you have additional tissue samples to embed, return to step 4 and repeat through step 11. go to step #3
